nodes.name: St. Lawrence Market
nodes.description: Start your day at this iconic market, where you can grab a breakfast of famed peameal bacon sandwiches from Carousel Bakery.
nodes.text_for_embedding: POI: St. Lawrence Market - Start your day at this iconic market, where you can grab a breakfast of famed peameal bacon sandwiches from Carousel Bakery.

nodes.name: CN Tower
nodes.description: Visit one of the world's tallest towers and enjoy panoramic city views from the observation deck.
nodes.text_for_embedding: POI: CN Tower - Visit one of the world's tallest towers and enjoy panoramic city views from the observation deck.

nodes.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
nodes.description: Explore Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a Frank Gehry-designed building.
nodes.text_for_embedding: POI: Art Gallery of Ontario - Explore Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a Frank Gehry-designed building.

nodes.name: Royal Ontario Museum
nodes.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history.
nodes.text_for_embedding: POI: Royal Ontario Museum - World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history.

nodes.name: Casa Loma
nodes.description: Historic castle featuring secret passages, gardens, and panoramic views.
nodes.text_for_embedding: POI: Casa Loma - Historic castle featuring secret passages, gardens, and panoramic views.

nodes.name: Rivoli
nodes.description: Live music venue showcasing jazz, indie, and emerging artists.
nodes.text_for_embedding: POI: Rivoli - Live music venue showcasing jazz, indie, and emerging artists.

nodes.name: Toronto Islands
nodes.description: Ferry ride to scenic islands with beaches, bike trails, and gardens.
nodes.text_for_embedding: POI: Toronto Islands - Ferry ride to scenic islands with beaches, bike trails, and gardens.

nodes.name: Distillery District
nodes.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets and artisan shops.
nodes.text_for_embedding: POI: Distillery District - Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets and artisan shops.
